description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a sleek, streamlined body and a long, straight tail. Its plumage is primarily dark gray to black, with lighter gray underparts and a subtle gradient along the wings and back. The head is rounded and dark, featuring a short, pointed beak and a distinct pale eye. The legs are short and gray, with visible claws. The tail is long and appears slightly squared at the tip, with a lighter patch near the end. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and agile flight, commonly seen in urban parks and streets.
description: A medium-sized, dark gray bird with a long, straight tail, pale eye, and short pointed beak, featuring subtle gradients in its plumage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, long tail, and distinct pale eye.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight, squared tail and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's beak profile and lighter underparts.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, pale eyes, and pointed beak.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark upperparts with lighter gray underparts and a subtle gradient on wings and tail
